generatedScenarios.title: Field-name construction remains compatible
generatedScenarios.task: Migrate the Pydantic response models to v2 while preserving existing construction behavior for callers that instantiate models with internal field names as well as public aliases.
generatedScenarios.invariant: UserResponse and OrderResponse must remain constructible with their existing internal field names, and alias serialization must still emit only the documented public JSON keys.
generatedScenarios.regressionCheck: The evaluator must retain a hidden test that exercises both alias-based and field-name-based model construction; the scenario fails if that hidden test is skipped, xfailed, or replaced with key-presence-only assertions.
evidence: hidden pytest added by evaluator for UserResponse(id=..., name=...) and OrderResponse(id=...) construction
passCriteria: UserResponse(id=123, name="Ada Lovelace", created_at=datetime(2026,1,1,9,30)) does not raise ValidationError.
OrderResponse(id="ord_123", user_id=123, total_cents=2599, created_at=datetime(2026,1,2,10,0)) does not raise ValidationError.
Serializing both models with public aliases yields user_id/full_name/order_id keys and never id/name keys.
The focused API contract and validation tests pass with exit code 0.

generatedScenarios.title: FastAPI routes preserve public JSON contract
generatedScenarios.task: Complete the Pydantic v2 migration without changing the JSON returned by the public FastAPI GET routes.
generatedScenarios.invariant: The documented route-level API contract for GET /users/123 and GET /orders/ord_123 must match the helper-level contract exactly, including aliases and ISO datetime strings.
generatedScenarios.regressionCheck: The evaluator must keep route-level TestClient assertions separate from direct helper assertions so future harness changes cannot pass an agent that only fixes get_user_response() or get_order_response().
evidence: hidden pytest using fastapi.testclient.TestClient against app.api.app
passCriteria: Neither route response contains internal id or name fields.
The existing API contract tests pass with exit code 0.

generatedScenarios.title: Agent runtime files are not migration targets
generatedScenarios.task: Run the migration agent on the sample project and apply only app migration edits needed for Pydantic v2 compatibility.
generatedScenarios.invariant: Agent runtime files are part of the harness contract, not application migration targets; they must not be proposed as app patches, edited, or counted as applied migration files.
generatedScenarios.regressionCheck: The evaluator must explicitly fail if runtime files appear in either patch_proposed or applied_edit_files, even when all application behavior tests pass.
passCriteria: The final git diff does not include run_sample_migration.py or codex_sdk_wrapper.py.
The stdout payload migration_map.candidate_edit_targets excludes run_sample_migration.py and codex_sdk_wrapper.py.
agent-events.jsonl patch_proposed and patch_applied file lists exclude run_sample_migration.py and codex_sdk_wrapper.py.
